I found your dentist appointment and can reschedule it. Details I see:
- Title: Dentist Appointment
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00

(Today is 2024-05-15.)

How would you like to reschedule it? Please tell me one of the following:
- A specific new date and start time (e.g., "May 22 at 10:30"), or
- A range/constraints (e.g., "any weekday morning next week", or "no mornings, only after 2 pm"), or

Once you tell me your preference I’ll reschedule the event and notify you.
